subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. Jan. 1909
subcodes.first_line: It hath been written that they desire to sell certain jewels of the Crown of Iran. Know ye that the Crown of Iran is Justice [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نوشته اند که میخواهند بعضی از سنگهای تاج ایران را بفروشند تاج ایران عدالت است
subcodes.subjects: @past, present and future of Iran, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @symbolism, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
